message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #C8E6C9
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #81C784
skinparam stereotypeIBackgroundColor #D1C4E9
skinparam stereotypeIBorderColor #9575CD

class GUI {
}

class IController {
  + getPlanets()
  + addPlanet(Planet)
  + updatePlanet(Planet)
  + deletePlanetById(int)
  + getUFOsByPlanetId(int)
  + addUFOTOPlanet(UFO, int)
  + updateUFO(UFO)
  + deleteUFOById(int)
  + deleteUFOsByPlanetId(int)
}

class Controller {
}

class IDatabase {
  + getPlanets()
  + savePlanet()
  + deltePlanet()
  + newPlanet()
}

class RelationalDatabase {
}

GUI -- IController
GUI ..> IDatabase
Controller --|> IController
Controller ..> IDatabase
IController -- IDatabase
RelationalDatabase --|> IDatabase

note top of GUI
  <<C>>
end note

note top of IController
  <<I>>
end note

note top of Controller
  <<C>>
end note

note top of IDatabase
  <<I>>
end note

note top of RelationalDatabase
  <<C>>
end note
@enduml
